Package space.sunqian.fs.base.option

Class OptionKit

java.lang.Object
space.sunqian.fs.base.option.OptionKit
public class OptionKit extends Object
Utilities for option.

    Description

    Returns whether the given options contain an option whose key equals the specified key.

    O

    Finds and returns the first option whose key equals the specified key from the given options, or null if not found.

    Finds the first option whose key equals the specified key from the given options.
    static boolean

    Returns true if the given options contains an option whose key equals the specified key and the value of the option is enabled checked by StringKit.isEnabled(CharSequence).

  • Method Details

    • findOption

      @Nullable public static <K, V, O extends Option<K, V>> O findOption(@Nonnull K key, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
      Finds and returns the first option whose key equals the specified key from the given options, or null if not found. This method will cast returned option to the specified type O.
      Type Parameters:
      K - the key type
      V - the value type
      O - the returned option type
      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      options - the given options
      Returns:
      the first option whose key equals the specified key from the given options, or null if not found

    • findValue

      public static <V> V findValue(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object key, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
      Finds the first option whose key equals the specified key from the given options. Returns the value of the found option, or null if not found. This method will cast returned value to the specified type V.
      Type Parameters:
      V - the value type
      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      options - the given options
      Returns:
      the value of the found option, or null if not found

    • containsKey

      public static boolean containsKey(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object key, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
      Returns whether the given options contain an option whose key equals the specified key.
      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      options - the given options
      Returns:
      true if given options contain an option whose key equals the specified key, otherwise false

    • mergeOptions

      @Nonnull public static <K, V> @Nonnull Option<K,V> @Nonnull [] mergeOptions(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull @RetainedParam [] defaultOptions, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... additionalOptions)
      Merges the additional options to the default options.

      If the additional options array is empty, the default options array will be returned. Otherwise, a new array will be copied from the default options array with the new length and returned. Any additional option whose key equals the key of the default option will override the default option in the returned array. Any new additional option whose key does not exist in the default options array will be added to the returned array.

      Type Parameters:
      K - the key type
      V - the value type
      Parameters:
      defaultOptions - the default options
      additionalOptions - the additional options
      Returns:
      the merged options

    • mergeOption

      @Nonnull public static <K, V> @Nonnull Option<K,V> @Nonnull [] mergeOption(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] defaultOptions, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> additionalOption)
      Merges the additional option to the default options.

      This method always returns a new array copied from the default options array. If the key of the additional option equals the key of any option in the default options array, the additional option will override the default option in the returned array. Otherwise, the additional option will be added to the returned array.

      Type Parameters:
      K - the key type
      V - the value type
      Parameters:
      defaultOptions - the default options
      additionalOption - the additional option
      Returns:
      the merged options

    • isEnabled

      public static boolean isEnabled(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object key, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
      Returns true if the given options contains an option whose key equals the specified key and the value of the option is enabled checked by StringKit.isEnabled(CharSequence).
      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      options - the given options
      Returns:
      true if the given options contains an option whose key equals the specified key and the value of the option is enabled checked by StringKit.isEnabled(CharSequence)
